# Meridian PSI

> Meridian PSI is a real-time psychological stability monitor and behavioral risk-control add-on for NinjaTrader 8. It helps discretionary futures traders detect revenge trading, overtrading, stop-loss manipulation, oversizing, and rule violations, while Meridian Guard can enforce user-defined warnings, cooldowns, lockouts, and entry blocking before traders break their own rules.

## Platform

- NinjaTrader 8, Windows only. NT7 is not supported. Mac is not supported.
- All data is stored locally. No cloud. No telemetry. No external transmission of trade data.
- The only outbound request is a license key validation on startup via Whop.

## What Meridian monitors (7 behavioral dimensions)

- Revenge Entry — rapid re-entry at elevated size after a loss
- Overtrading Pace — entry frequency exceeding personal historical baseline
- Stop-Loss Manipulation — widening or removing protective stops on active losing positions
- Size Spike — position sizing approaching maximum under loss conditions
- Rule Violations — trading outside declared session parameters
- Hold Bias / Position Overstay — abnormal hold duration correlated with unrealized loss
- Drawdown Depth — cumulative session drawdown relative to personal profile

All seven signals feed into the composite Psychological Stability Index (PSI), scored 0–100.

## What Meridian Guard enforces

Guard is an optional enforcement layer. Trigger types:
- PSI Below threshold
- N Consecutive Losses
- Session P&L Below declared limit
- Unrealized P&L Below threshold (before position closes)
- Single Trade Loss exceeds amount
- Session Time Over planned duration

Response levels (5):
1. Alert — quiet notification
2. Acknowledge — type a pre-written phrase before continuing
3. Countdown — mandatory timed pause, cannot be skipped
4. Risk Alert Mode — persistent banner, confirmation required before each entry
5. Disconnect — disconnects broker connection; open positions must be managed manually

Rules can be password-locked to prevent in-session override.

## What Meridian does not do

- Does not provide trade signals, entry/exit recommendations, or investment advice
- Does not auto-trade or place orders
- Does not close, modify, or liquidate open positions
- Does not require broker credentials
- Does not transmit trade data externally
- Does not guarantee behavioral failure modes will not occur
- Is not affiliated with NinjaTrader LLC

## Pricing

- Meridian Core: $49.99/month or $479.90/year (saves ~$120/yr)
- Meridian Guard: $69.99/month or $671.90/year (saves ~$168/yr)
- 7-day free trial on all plans. Credit card required at checkout.
- Checkout via Whop.

## Relationship to NinjaTrader

Meridian is a third-party add-on. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or supported by NinjaTrader LLC. NinjaTrader® is a registered trademark of NinjaTrader LLC.

## Compliance

Meridian is not investment advice. Trading involves substantial risk of loss. Results may vary. All performance-related claims describe behavioral monitoring capabilities, not financial outcomes.
